dashboard.label: Frothly BOTSv3 - Incident Response Dashboard
dashboard.description: Correlated view of compromised credentials, multi-region sweeps, and endpoint mining activity from IR-2018-001, IR-2018-002, and IR-2026-0701-001. Author: Insiyah Bhatia

panel.title: Active Critical Alerts - CloudTrail (T1496 Resource Hijacking)

search.query: index="botsv3" sourcetype="aws:cloudtrail" eventSource="ec2.amazonaws.com" eventName="RunInstances" | bin _time span=10m | stats dc(awsRegion) as distinct_regions, count as total_attempts, values(awsRegion) as regions_targeted, values(errorCode) as error_codes, values(sourceIPAddress) as source_ips by userIdentity.accessKeyId, _time | where distinct_regions >= 5 | eval severity = "CRITICAL" | eval mitre = "T1496 / T1526" | table _time userIdentity.accessKeyId distinct_regions total_attempts regions_targeted error_codes source_ips severity

index="botsv3" sourcetype="aws:cloudtrail" eventSource="iam.amazonaws.com" eventName IN ("GetCallerIdentity","ListAccessKeys","CreateAccessKey","DeleteAccessKey","CreateUser","GetSessionToken") | bin _time span=60s | stats dc(eventName) as distinct_sensitive_calls, values(eventName) as actions_called, values(errorCode) as outcomes, values(sourceIPAddress) as src_ips by userIdentity.accessKeyId, _time | where distinct_sensitive_calls >= 4 | eval severity = "HIGH" | eval mitre = "T1580 / T1087.003 / T1136.003 / T1098.001 / T1070" | table _time userIdentity.accessKeyId distinct_sensitive_calls actions_called outcomes src_ips severity
index="botsv3" sourcetype="aws:cloudtrail" eventSource="ec2.amazonaws.com" eventName="RunInstances" | stats count by errorCode | sort - count
index="botsv3" sourcetype="aws:cloudtrail" eventSource="ec2.amazonaws.com" eventName="RunInstances" | stats count by awsRegion | sort - count

index="botsv3" sourcetype="aws:cloudtrail" eventName="PutBucketAcl" | eval severity = "HIGH" | eval mitre = "T1530" | table _time userIdentity.userName requestParameters.bucketName sourceIPAddress severity mitre | sort _time

index="botsv3" sourcetype="stream:dns" (query="*coinhive*" OR query="*monero*" OR query="*cryptoloot*") | eval severity = "HIGH" | eval mitre = "T1496" | table _time host query query_type answer severity mitre | sort _time
index="botsv3" sourcetype="stream:tcp" dest_port=9998 | eval severity = "HIGH" | eval mitre = "T1571" | table _time host src_ip dest_ip dest_port bytes_in bytes_out severity mitre | sort _time

index="botsv3" sourcetype="stream:http" dest_ip="169.254.169.254" uri_path="*iam/security-credentials*" | bin _time span=1h | stats earliest(_time) as first_seen, count as query_count by host, _time | eval first_seen = strftime(first_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval severity = "CRITICAL" | eval mitre = "T1552.005" | table first_seen host query_count severity mitre | sort first_seen

index="botsv3" sourcetype="symantec:ep:security:file" ("*coinminer*" OR "*JSCoinminer*" OR "*coin miner*") | rex field=_raw "^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\s\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2},\w+,(?<endpoint_host>[^,]+)," | rex field=_raw "\[SID:\s*(?<signature_id>\d+)\]" | rex field=_raw "CIDS Signature string:\s*(?<signature_name>[^,]+)," | rex field=_raw "User:\s*(?<user_name>[^,]+)," | rex field=_raw "Application:\s*(?<file_path>[^,]+)," | rex field=_raw "Remote:\s*(?<remote_ip>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | eval severity = "MEDIUM" | eval mitre = "T1496" | table _time endpoint_host user_name file_path signature_name signature_id remote_ip severity mitre
index="botsv3" sourcetype="osquery:results" (columns.cmdline="*aws_ir*" OR columns.cmdline="*AKIA*") | table _time host name columns.cmdline columns.pid

index="botsv3" earliest=1534723200 latest=1534809599 (sourcetype="aws:cloudtrail" eventName IN ("RunInstances","PutBucketAcl","GetSessionToken","GetCallerIdentity","ListAccessKeys","CreateAccessKey","CreateUser")) OR (sourcetype="stream:tcp" dest_port=9998) OR (sourcetype="stream:dns" query="*coinhive*") OR (sourcetype="stream:http" dest_ip="169.254.169.254") OR (sourcetype="osquery:results" columns.cmdline="*aws_ir*") OR (sourcetype="symantec:ep:security:file" ("*coinminer*" OR "*JSCoinminer*")) | eval event_type = case( eventName="RunInstances", "EC2 Sweep", eventName="PutBucketAcl", "S3 ACL Change", eventName IN ("GetCallerIdentity","ListAccessKeys","CreateAccessKey","DeleteAccessKey","CreateUser","GetSessionToken"), "IAM Activity", sourcetype="stream:tcp" AND dest_port=9998, "C2 Beacon", sourcetype="stream:dns" AND (query="*coinhive*" OR query="*monero*"), "Miner DNS", sourcetype="stream:http" AND dest_ip="169.254.169.254", "IMDS Query", sourcetype="osquery:results" AND columns.cmdline="*aws_ir*", "IR Response", sourcetype="symantec:ep:security:file", "AV Block", true(), "Other") | timechart count by event_type span=30m limit=10

index="botsv3" earliest=1534723200 latest=1534809599 (sourcetype="aws:cloudtrail") OR (sourcetype="stream:tcp" dest_port=9998) OR (sourcetype="stream:dns" query="*coinhive*") OR (sourcetype="stream:http" dest_ip="169.254.169.254") OR (sourcetype="symantec:ep:security:file" ("*coinminer*" OR "*JSCoinminer*")) | eval mitre_id = case( eventName="RunInstances", "T1496", eventName="PutBucketAcl", "T1530", eventName="GetCallerIdentity", "T1580", eventName="ListAccessKeys", "T1087.003", eventName="CreateAccessKey", "T1098.001", eventName="CreateUser", "T1136.003", eventName="DeleteAccessKey", "T1070", eventName="GetSessionToken", "T1078.004", sourcetype="stream:tcp" AND dest_port=9998, "T1571", sourcetype="stream:dns" AND (query="*coinhive*" OR query="*monero*"), "T1496", sourcetype="stream:http" AND dest_ip="169.254.169.254", "T1552.005", sourcetype="symantec:ep:security:file", "T1496", true(), "UNMAPPED") | stats dc(_time) as events, count as total by mitre_id | sort - total
